rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: The Grand Palace
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: Built in 1782, this ornate royal palace complex now houses a museum & is open to visitors.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: The Temple of the Emerald Buddha
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: On the grounds of the Grand Palace, this sacred temple is renowned for its Emerald Buddha.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: Sanam Luang
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: Iconic, grassy city park serving as the site of occasional community & royal events.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: The Artist House Bangkok
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: Centuries-old house turned gallery, with local artwork, photography & a puppet theater.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: Phra Racha Wang Derm (Thonburi Palace)
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: Palace of King Taksin from the 1700s, plus 2 Chinese-style residences & a whale's head shrine.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: The Temple of The Emerald Buddha Museum (Wat Phra Keo Museum)
Phra Sumen Fort
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: This riverfront fort built in 1783 with an octagonal bunker & white exterior is in a small park.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: Saranrom Park
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: Landscaped park featuring a fountain, a pavilion, a greenhouse, a monument & more.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: Suan Luang Rama IX
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: Large green space featuring a jogging path, playground & gardens, plus a lake with paddle boats.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: Sri Nakhon Khuean Khan Park and Botanical Garden
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: Tranquil city park features abundant green space, walking paths, a lake & a bird viewing platform.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: Santi Chai Prakan Park
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: Small, tranquil riverfront park, home to Phra Sumen Fort, offering vistas of Rama VIII Bridge.

rattanakosin-grand-palace.name: Lumphini Park
rattanakosin-grand-palace.description: Central urban park featuring manicured lawns, playgrounds & an artificial lake with boat rentals.

khao-san-banglamphu.name: Bangkok Ethical Elephant Tour (Living Green Elephant Sanctuary)
The Giant Swing
khao-san-banglamphu.description: Landmark monument in the form of a tall, scarlet frame, overlooking a 19th-century Buddhist temple.

khao-san-banglamphu.name: Sanay Rooftop Bar Khaosan - เสน่ห์ รูฟท็อป บาร์ ข้าวสาร
Brick Bar
khao-san-banglamphu.description: Ska & reggae music venue with late-night hours, featuring space for over 1,000 guests.

khao-san-banglamphu.name: Bangkok City Pillar Shrine
khao-san-banglamphu.description: Small shrine housing the revered "city pillar" erected when Siam's capital moved to Bangkok in 1782.

khao-san-banglamphu.name: Wat Arun Ratchawararam Ratchawaramahawihan
khao-san-banglamphu.description: Monumental Buddhist temple right on the river, with an iconic, ornately tiled central prang (spire).

khao-san-banglamphu.name: Wat Ratchabophit Sathitmahasimaram Ratchaworawihan
khao-san-banglamphu.description: Ornate 19th-century Buddhist temple with a colorful tiled exterior & a cemetery for Thai royalty.

khao-san-banglamphu.name: Wat Phra Chetuphon Wimon Mangkhalaram Rajwaramahawihan
khao-san-banglamphu.description: Large landmark temple offering serene grounds with a giant reclining Buddha, historic art & statues.

khao-san-banglamphu.name: National Museum Bangkok
khao-san-banglamphu.description: Centuries-old Siamese treasures, weapons & royal antiques displayed in 18th-century palace halls.

khao-san-banglamphu.name: Wat Ratchapradit Sathit Maha Simaram
khao-san-banglamphu.description: Marble tiles, gilded teak & vivid mosaics at a grand 19th-century temple & royal monastery complex.

khao-san-banglamphu.name: Romaneenart Park
khao-san-banglamphu.description: Urban park on a former prison site with a playground, water features & fountains.

khao-san-banglamphu.name: Benjakitti Park
khao-san-banglamphu.description: A running & biking path encircles a lake with boats, fish & turtles in this serene, scenic park.

chinatown-yaowarat.name: ซุ้มประตูเฉลิมพระเกียรติ 6 รอบพระชนมพรรษา
chinatown-yaowarat.description: Erected in 1999 in honor of King Adulyadej, this ornate gate marks the entrance to Chinatown.

chinatown-yaowarat.name: Chinese Lantern Alley 中國燈衚衕
ตึกดอกไม้ (อาคารโบราณถนนทรงวาด)
Lhong 1919
chinatown-yaowarat.description: 19th-century Chinese mansion restored as a mixed-use complex with restaurants, stores & a shrine.

chinatown-yaowarat.name: Ang Yi อั่งยี่
Wat Trai Mit Witthayaram Worawihan
chinatown-yaowarat.description: This historic temple features a gilded exterior, exhibitions & a massive golden statue of Buddha.

chinatown-yaowarat.name: Wat Mangkon Kamalawat (Wat Leng Noei Yi)
chinatown-yaowarat.description: Chinese Buddhist temple with numerous courtyards & passageways, known for its New Year's festival.

chinatown-yaowarat.name: Rommani Nat Park
chinatown-yaowarat.description: An outdoor gym, skatepark & playground on the site of a former prison with the old guard towers.

chinatown-yaowarat.name: Wachirabenchathat Park (State Railway Park)
chinatown-yaowarat.description: Vast, tree-filled park with a lake offering a long loop for biking & running, plus tennis courts.

silom-sathorn.name: King Power Mahanakhon
silom-sathorn.description: A 78-floor mirrored skyscraper used for hotel rooms & retail with a viewing deck at 1,030 feet.

silom-sathorn.name: Sri Maha Mariamman Temple (Wat Khaek)
silom-sathorn.description: Built in 1873, this Hindu temple features an added 5-tiered tower with ornate, colorful carvings.

silom-sathorn.name: Bangkokian Museum
silom-sathorn.description: Compact museum focused primarily on 2 reconstructed houses from the early 20th century.

silom-sathorn.name: Wat Suthat Thepwararam Ratchaworamahawihan
silom-sathorn.description: Ornate 19th-century Buddhist temple, famed for its 20-m. red teak Giant Swing & 8 m. bronze Buddha.

silom-sathorn.name: Wat Hualamphong
silom-sathorn.description: Monks reside at this royal Buddhist temple with ornate details & a colorful, chandelier-lit hall.

silom-sathorn.name: Jim Thompson House Museum
silom-sathorn.description: Thai-style teak house by American entrepreneur Jim Thompson with an art collection & guided tours.

silom-sathorn.name: Suthiwararam Temple
silom-sathorn.description: Temple complex featuring intricately gilded exteriors & a collection of contemporary Buddhist art.

silom-sathorn.name: Princess Mother Memorial Park
silom-sathorn.description: Leafy city park dedicated to the Thai royal princess, with gardens, statues & an exhibition hall.

sukhumvit-asok.name: SEA LIFE Bangkok Ocean World
sukhumvit-asok.description: Spacious aquarium offers hundreds of marine species on display, 4-D films & underwater experiences.

sukhumvit-asok.name: Safari World
sukhumvit-asok.description: Zoo & entertainment park featuring safari rides, marine attractions, live feedings & stunt shows.

sukhumvit-asok.name: Wat That Thong
sukhumvit-asok.description: Ornate temple complex hosting traditional Buddhist rituals & Thai cremation ceremonies.

sukhumvit-asok.name: Wat Ratchanatdaram Worawihan
sukhumvit-asok.description: Buddhist temple complex, home to a Loha Prasat, known as the "metal castle" for its 37 iron spires.

sukhumvit-asok.name: The Ancient City
sukhumvit-asok.description: Thailand-shaped park with life-sized & scaled-down replicas of prominent buildings & monuments.

sukhumvit-asok.name: Benchasiri Park
sukhumvit-asok.description: This 4.5-hectare green space offers landscaped lakeside grounds, modern sculptures & outdoor events.

chatuchak-ari.name: Chatuchak Weekend Market
chatuchak-ari.description: Massive market with over 15,000 stalls offering an eclectic variety of goods, from antiques to pets.

chatuchak-ari.name: Chatuchak Park
chatuchak-ari.description: Verdant recreational space with broad, tree-lined jogging & cycling paths, flower beds & a big pond.

chatuchak-ari.name: Children’s Discovery Museum
chatuchak-ari.description: Science-focused museum featuring interactive indoor & outdoor exhibits for kids, plus a water park.

chatuchak-ari.name: Queen Sirikit Park
chatuchak-ari.description: Picnic areas dot this tranquil botanical garden with lawns, walking paths, fountains & ponds.

chatuchak-ari.name: Bangkok Butterfly Garden and Insectarium
chatuchak-ari.description: Butterflies in a plant-filled domed enclosure with a stream & waterfall, plus an exhibition area.

chatuchak-ari.name: Wat Saket Ratchawora Mahawihan
chatuchak-ari.description: Ayutthaya-era (1350-1767) Buddhist temple & pilgrimage site commanding extensive city views.

chatuchak-ari.name: Wat Samian Nari
chatuchak-ari.description: Temple complex from the 1800s, with an ornate gold-gabled hall, numerous Buddha images & live cows.

old-city-moat.name: Chiang Mai Night Bazaar
old-city-moat.description: Bustling night market featuring street food vendors & local crafts, plus souvenirs.

old-city-moat.name: Muang On Cave
old-city-moat.description: Hillside cave network with stalactites & stalagmites, plus small shrines & Buddha statues.

old-city-moat.name: Royal Pavilion
old-city-moat.description: Sprawling palace compound in lush, hillside surrounds known for its enshrined emerald Buddha.

old-city-moat.name: Tha Phae Walking Street
old-city-moat.description: Each Sunday afternoon until midnight this street becomes a gallery for local arts & crafts.

old-city-moat.name: Chiang Mai Gate Market
old-city-moat.description: Bustling open-air market with a wide range of food stalls serving street eats, sweets & produce.

old-city-moat.name: Chom Cafe and Restaurant
old-city-moat.description: Laid-back operation serving stir-fry, salads & sharing plates, plus desserts & coffee drinks.

old-city-moat.name: Tha Phae Gate
old-city-moat.description: Known as a site for many community events, this preserved city gate dates back to ancient times.

old-city-moat.name: Three Kings Monument
old-city-moat.description: Sculpture of Kings Mengrai, Ramkamhaeng and Ngam Muang, purported founding fathers of Chiang Mai.

old-city-moat.name: Wat Umong Suan Putthatham
old-city-moat.description: Historic Buddhist temple complex with woods, a small lake, ancient tunnels & practicing monks.

old-city-moat.name: Chiang Mai Historical Centre
old-city-moat.description: Simple museum offering exhibits on the history of Chiang Mai, plus an inner courtyard with a shrine.

old-city-moat.name: Wat Phra That Doi Suthep
old-city-moat.description: In addition to its gold stupa, pagodas & museum, this mountainside temple offers broad city views.

old-city-moat.name: Wat Lok Moli
old-city-moat.description: Buddhist temple dating to at least the 1300s & featuring a prominent chedi (stratified tower).

old-city-moat.name: Doi Suthep-Pui National Park
old-city-moat.description: Forested national park featuring a Buddhist temple, Bhubing Palace, wildlife, waterfalls & more.

old-city-moat.name: Buak Had Public Park
old-city-moat.description: Sizable park with a contemporary playground, picnic areas, shade trees & water features.

old-city-moat.name: จุดชมวิวดาดฟ้าเมญ่า
Royal Park Rajapruek
old-city-moat.description: Landscaped grounds featuring flowers, plants & sculptures, plus an elegant commemorative chapel.

nimman-maya-area.name: One Nimman
nimman-maya-area.description: Retail shops, cafes & food stalls share space in a modern marketplace with big windows & a hip vibe.

nimman-maya-area.name: Chiang Mai Night Safari
nimman-maya-area.description: Large zoo with many animal species, day & evening tram safari rides, kids' activities & shows.

nimman-maya-area.name: Mon Jam
nimman-maya-area.description: Mountaintop farming community with panoramic views, accommodations, shops & on-site meals.

nimman-maya-area.name: Huen Muan Jai
nimman-maya-area.description: Well-known cafe serving traditional local fare in a restored wooden villa that has a garden.

nimman-maya-area.name: Wat Chedi Luang
nimman-maya-area.description: Temple complex with a partially crumbled 15th-century chedi & a pillar believed to protect the city.

nimman-maya-area.name: Wat Phra Singh Woramahawihan
nimman-maya-area.description: 14th-century Buddhist temple boasting gold & copper Buddhas, murals & ancient manuscripts.

nimman-maya-area.name: Wiang Kum Kam
nimman-maya-area.description: Tours are available of these brick ruins of an ancient city & temple in serene surrounds.

nimman-maya-area.name: Wat Jedyod Royal Temple Wat Chet Yod Phra Aram Luang

nimman-maya-area.name: Wat Chiang Man

nimman-maya-area.name: Kew Mae Pan nature trail
nimman-maya-area.description: Guided nature trail through a forest featuring a waterfall & observation areas with scenic views.

nimman-maya-area.name: Doi Inthanon National Park
nimman-maya-area.description: Trails offers scenic views in this popular national park with pagodas near the summit & waterfalls.

sunday-walking-street.name: Wua Lai Walking Street Saturday Market
sunday-walking-street.description: Outdoor bazaar with vendors selling traditional street snacks, handmade crafts & souvenirs.

sunday-walking-street.name: Chiang Mai Night Market
sunday-walking-street.description: Bustling, colorful Sunday night market for local produce, prepared foods, crafts & souvenirs.

sunday-walking-street.name: Jing Jai Market Chiang Mai
sunday-walking-street.description: Lively weekend market supplying organic fruits & vegetables, plus food, beverages & handicrafts.

sunday-walking-street.name: Anusarn Market
sunday-walking-street.description: Bustling traditional market with many souvenir & food stalls, plus nightly cabaret shows.

sunday-walking-street.name: ถนนคนเดินเชียงใหม่
The Canopy Walks
sunday-walking-street.description: Long walkway suspended above the forest canopy, with views of mountains & the gardens below.

doi-suthep-mountain.name: Wat Pha Lat
doi-suthep-mountain.description: Small, statue-rich Buddhist temple & monastery hidden in a woodland & reached via a hiking trail.

doi-suthep-mountain.name: Wat Suan Dok
doi-suthep-mountain.description: Buddhist temple in tranquil surrounds with a golden dome, ornate interior & historic mausoleum.

doi-suthep-mountain.name: Dantewada Land of Angels Waterfall Park
Doi Suthep Hiking Trail (Wat Pha Lat)
Doi Suthep

doi-suthep-mountain.name: Hmong Doi Pui Village
doi-suthep-mountain.description: Hillside village set in a lush national park, home to a Hmong tribe, who sell traditional crafts.

doi-suthep-mountain.name: จุดถ่ายภาพ พระธาตุดอยสุเทพและเมืองเชียงใหม่
Wat Phra That Doi Kham
doi-suthep-mountain.description: Temple atop a forested mountain featuring ornate gold carvings & a 17-m. sitting Buddha statue.

elephants-mae-taeng-valley.name: Elephant Nature Park
elephants-mae-taeng-valley.description: Elephant rescue & rehabilitation center with volunteer opportunities, jungle tours & rafting.

elephants-mae-taeng-valley.name: Elephant Jungle Sanctuary Chiang Mai (Grand Canyon Branch)

Ethical elephant sanctuary chiangmai by Big Boy
Mae Sa Elephant Camp
elephants-mae-taeng-valley.description: Attraction offering elephant shows, elephant painting & experiences such as bathing & riding.

elephants-mae-taeng-valley.name: Thai Elephant Home

patong-beach.name: Freedom Beach

patong-beach.name: Dolphins Bay Phuket
patong-beach.description: Aquatic theme park featuring high-energy marine-life shows & up-close dolphin encounters.

patong-beach.name: Ancient buildings in Sino-European style

patong-beach.name: Chinpracha House

patong-beach.name: Promthep Cape
patong-beach.description: Picturesque cape & lookout point known for its stunning sea views, especially at sunset.

patong-beach.name: Khao Rang Viewpoint
patong-beach.description: Well-known hilltop site with a park & terrace for sweeping views of the town & offshore islands.

patong-beach.name: Karon Viewpoint Phuket
patong-beach.description: Well-known destination for picturesque views of the ocean, beaches & lush island surroundings.

phuket-old-town.name: Phuket Old Town Sunday Night Market Walking Street
Phuket Old Town
phuket-old-town.description: Sleek rooms with minimalist decor in a trendy hotel offering breakfast & a terrace with city views.

phuket-old-town.name: Sirinat National Park

phuket-old-town.description: Forested hilltop home to roaming monkeys, with an observation platform offering panoramic views.

kata-karon-south.name: Wat Karon
kata-karon-south.description: Twice-weekly collection of vendors selling local street snacks, spices & colorful handicrafts.

kata-karon-south.name: วัดกิตติสังฆาราม
Wat Khao Rang Samakkhitham
kata-karon-south.description: Brightly painted hillside temple with carved naga snakes & a gigantic, golden seated Buddha.

kata-karon-south.name: Karon Park
kata-karon-south.description: Large, scenic beach area with limited recreational facilities & weekend food markets.

kata-karon-south.name: Khun Pradit house viewpoint and food

surin-bang-tao-north.name: Banana Beach
surin-bang-tao-north.description: Tranquil beach hideaway in unspoiled surrounds for swimming, sunbathing & other low-key activities.

surin-bang-tao-north.name: XANA
surin-bang-tao-north.description: Modern club with a 35-m. swim-up bar, a private rooftop terrace & a state-of-the-art sound system.

surin-bang-tao-north.name: Thao Thep Krasattri and Thao Si Sunthon Monument
Thalang National Museum
surin-bang-tao-north.description: This small museum features area archeological finds & other exhibits on the region's history.

surin-bang-tao-north.name: Wat Phra Nang Sang
surin-bang-tao-north.description: Decorative temple with Buddha statues covered in gold plate, thought to be hundreds of years old.

surin-bang-tao-north.name: Sirinat National Park Protection Unit (Hat Layan)

phang-nga-bay-nearby.description: Hilltop viewpoint with a cafe overlooking a James Bond film set accessed via foot or shuttle.

phang-nga-bay-nearby.description: Protected area of mountains & tropical rainforest, with hiking trails & the Tam​ Nang waterfall​.

phang-nga-bay-nearby.description: Tropical park with hiking trails passing several small waterfalls, a bat cave & monkeys.

railay-beach.description: Colorful rooms & pagoda-style bungalows in a relaxed retreat with a pool, a dive center & dining.

Secret Garden Beach Resort

chaweng-beach.name: The Jungle Club

ayutthaya-historical-park.name: Wat Chaiwatthanaram

ayutthaya-historical-park.description: Busy, modern temple best known for its massive, gilded statue of the sitting Buddha.

sukhothai-new-town.description: Remains of a sacred hilltop site, known for its 12-meter Buddha statue surrounded by column relics.

ramkhamhaeng-national-park.name: Ramkhamhaeng National Museum
ramkhamhaeng-national-park.description: Museum displaying art, artifacts & antiques from the  centuries-old Sukhothai period.

pai-walking-street-centre.name: Pai Canyon
pai-walking-street-centre.description: Serene, scenic canyon with narrow, ledgy hiking trails that offer sweeping valley views.

pai-walking-street-centre.name: Yun Lai Viewpoint
pai-walking-street-centre.description: Reached by car or scooter, this hilltop village complex offers tea service & panoramic valley views.

pai-walking-street-centre.name: Santichon Village
pai-walking-street-centre.description: Pony rides & a rustic Ferris wheel at a Chinese village, plus shops for artisanal souvenirs.

pai-walking-street-centre.name: ถนนคนเดินเมืองปาย
Wat Phra That Mae Yen
pai-walking-street-centre.description: Temple with a monumental staircase climbing to a huge white Buddha statue & views over Pai.

pai-walking-street-centre.name: Vieng Tai Public Park (สวนสาธารณะ เวียงใต้)

pai-canyon-yun-lai-viewpoint.name: ศูนย์วัฒนธรรมจีนยูนนาน
ทางขึ้นทะเลหมอกหยุนไหล
Morpaeng Waterfall
pai-canyon-yun-lai-viewpoint.description: Lush natural area featuring a quaint waterfall, multiple swimming pools & mountain views.

wat-mae-yen-hilltop.name: Wat Nam Hu
wat-mae-yen-hilltop.description: Compact Buddhist temple with a fish pond, picturesque views & a tranquil atmosphere.

wat-mae-yen-hilltop.name: Huai Nam Dang National Park
wat-mae-yen-hilltop.description: Lush national park providing rolling hills with mountain views, waterfalls & hot springs/baths.
